name: pdf-ocr-scan
description: OCR text extraction from scanned PDFs and images. Tesseract with 100+ languages, word-level bounding boxes, image preprocessing, and document scan enhancement. Powered by PDFAPIHub.
author: PdfApiHub

apiKey.description: PDFAPIHub API key (required). Get a free key at https://pdfapihub.com. Files are sent to PDFAPIHub servers for processing.
